headers.description: Monexus Terminal API key. Minted by a 30-day pass (GET https://terminal.themonexus.com/api/v1/pass?tier=wire|desk|bureau via x402, or card at /api/v1/pass/payfast) or a membership (/api/v1/member/subscribe). Optional: without it, paid tools return structured x402 payment guidance and the free list_categories tool still works.
headers.name: X-API-Key
